name: Boss Fight: Fighter Action Surge Nova + OA on Fleeing Ogre
description: Reproduces the boss-fight test run: Level 5 Fighter (Thorin) vs an Ogre (59 HP, AC 11). Thorin uses 2 regular attacks + Action Surge for 2 more (4 total via Extra Attack). Then uses queueMonsterActions to script the Ogre to flee, triggering an Opportunity Attack. Tests: Extra Attack chaining, Action Surge resource spending, OA on fleeing monster, and high-HP enemy survival across multiple attacks.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: Take one additional action on your turn

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: Regain HP as a bonus action

actions.comment: Initiative 18+2=20. Thorin goes first. Ogre has endTurn behavior to stay passive for Round 1.
--- Attack 1 of 2 (regular action): Longsword vs Ogre ---

input.text: I attack the Ogre with my longsword

actions.comment: 15+6=21 vs AC 11 → hit
8+3=11 damage. Ogre HP: 59→48. Extra Attack chains to attack 2/2.
--- Attack 2 of 2 (Extra Attack chain): Longsword vs Ogre ---
14+6=20 vs AC 11 → hit
6+3=9 damage. Ogre HP: 48→39. Regular action complete (2 attacks done).
--- Action Surge: Grants 1 additional action (2 more attacks with Extra Attack) ---
--- Action Surge Attack 1 of 2: Longsword vs Ogre ---

input.text: I attack the Ogre with my longsword

actions.comment: 7+6=13 vs AC 11 → hit
5+3=8 damage. Ogre HP: 39→31. Surge Extra Attack chains to surge 2/2.
--- Action Surge Attack 2 of 2 (Extra Attack chain): Longsword vs Ogre ---
12+6=18 vs AC 11 → hit
7+3=10 damage. Ogre HP: 31→21. All 4 attacks complete.
Queue the Ogre to flee on its turn (moveAwayFrom triggers OA)
End player turn — Ogre uses queued flee decision
Wait for Ogre to flee and trigger OA. Server should prompt for OA.
Ogre fleeing should trigger OA prompt for Thorin
Roll OA attack: natural 20 for critical hit against the fleeing Ogre
20+6=26 vs AC 11 → crit hit. OA auto-resolves damage (server-rolled).
Wait for Ogre's turn to complete (endTurn: true in queued action) and player turn to begin
Verify combat is still active. OA damage is server-rolled so Ogre may survive.
